notes: Public site (multilingual es/en/fr) + CRM/lead intake. Internal-first delivery: built for Holistica's own canal de adquisición; doubles as the canonical brand-visual source. No external revenue but anchors the moat narrative ('we sell on the same stack we use').

Multi-modulo ERP for Holistica's own ops. Tematizacion + verificacion automatica completa antes de cada despliegue. Internal-only product; walkthrough available under NDA. No external revenue but proves dogfooding rigor.

First-party SaaS. Currently internal use; first paying external customer is a 0-6m milestone (`BOOTSTRAPPING_PLAN.md` §scenario base). Pricing per `PRICING_MODEL.md` §1.2 (3-tier hybrid). The core productization story for the deck.

Holistica delivered the Shopify carrito-bundle app (admin Polaris + storefront extension); partner Websitz held end-client relationship. ~120 pruebas automaticas + CI multi-job + 6 idiomas. Partner-share per `PRICING_MODEL.md` §1.3. Anchor proof for Channel 2 (partner B2B).

SaaS B2B scaffold for partner Rushly. Arquitectura congelada antes de codificar; monorepo TypeScript estricto; CI multi-job. Demonstrates 'compliance-aware product program' pattern. Currently in design with scaffold productivo; next milestone: implementation phase signed.
